description: Revel in the comfort of pure leather and look stylish in ease in this pair of peep toe sandals from enroute. Pair it with any kind of western and ethnic wear, and look great both ways.This pair comes with a shoe bag to help you carry it around in ease.Heel: 1.5"UpperWide midfoot strap in leather Cushioned nubuck footbed, stitched to the outsoleOutsoleDurable TPU outsole textured in a horse shoe shap on the forefoot and heel for absolute grip and tractionSandal careWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust and dirtClean the footbed with a nubuck brushDo not store in direct sunlight
